findings.description: The source XML example for the validator configuration file contains `<!-- 中略 -->` indicating that additional validator entries are omitted. The knowledge file removed this comment and replaced it with proper closing tags (`</list>` and `</property>`), presenting the example as a complete and self-contained list. This misrepresents the source, which explicitly signals that more content exists beyond what is shown.
findings.source_evidence:
Source: `    <!-- 中略 -->
</property>` (no closing `</list>` tag, with 中略 indicating abbreviated content). Knowledge file: `  </list>
</property>` (closing tags added, 中略 removed)
